compatibility_tests.name: UMR Discipline
compatibility_tests.pass_condition: unmeasured residual is not forced into certainty

compatibility_tests.name: Operational/Restoration Cost Split
compatibility_tests.pass_condition: low C_op(P) is not treated as low C_rest(P)

compatibility_tests.name: Routing Minimality
compatibility_tests.pass_condition: smallest sufficient module rule is preserved

compatibility_tests.name: Externalized Cost Check
compatibility_tests.pass_condition: local cost reduction does not externalize hidden cost
